display.purpose: Hero headline, one per page. Archivo 700 at 110% width, -0.03em, two-tone sentence.

headline.purpose: Section headers, always two-tone (bright phrase + muted elaboration).

shadows.name: glow-lagoon
shadows.purpose: The only radial treatment: static top-edge lagoon wash on framed captures and glow-panels. Never pulsing, never a border.

shadows.name: mark-anchor
shadows.purpose: BrandMark on the atoll band only.

motion.name: ease-tide
motion.purpose: Entrances (rise-in, the hero capture's single signature entrance).

components.name: Primary Button (foam fill)
components.description: Highest-priority CTA on the dark canvas. Light fill is the loud element; the accent stays scarce.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f3faf5; color: #173a40; height: 40px; padding: 0 22px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e4efe8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4fb8b2; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA on the dark canvas.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #f2f6f5; height: 40px; padding: 0 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(243,250,245,0.11); border-radius: 6px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #131b1e; border-color: rgba(243,250,245,0.22); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4fb8b2; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Inline mono label inside the three feature cards only. Static.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background: rgba(79,184,178,0.10); color: #4fb8b2; border-radius: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

components.name: Frame Shot
components.description: A real console capture in a hairline frame with the static lagoon glow. The rebrand's signature component.
components.css: .ds-frame-shot { position: relative; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(243,250,245,0.14); border-radius: 8px; background: #131b1e; isolation: isolate; } .ds-frame-shot::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; background: radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 0%, rgba(79,184,178,0.10) 0%, transparent 62%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-frame-shot__img { aspect-ratio: 16/10; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #a8b4b3; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Glow Panel (ledger cell)
components.description: Hairline-ruled cell on the canvas; the lagoon wash fades in on hover (opacity only).
components.html:
Every call, traced

Traces, spans, generations, and scores on a waterfall timeline.
components.css: .ds-glow-panel { position: relative; isolation: isolate; background: #0d1417; border: 1px solid rgba(243,250,245,0.14); padding: 24px 28px 32px; color: #f2f6f5; } .ds-glow-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -1; background: radial-gradient(120% 90% at 50% 0%, rgba(79,184,178,0.10) 0%, transparent 62%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 260ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); pointer-events: none; } .ds-glow-panel:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-glow-panel__title { margin: 0 0 10px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-stretch: 110%; letter-spacing: -0.03em; font-size: 22px; } .ds-glow-panel__body { margin: 0; color: #a8b4b3; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.65; }

components.name: Two-Tone Headline
components.description: The section-header system: bright key phrase + muted elaboration, one sentence, one element. Replaces eyebrow kickers.
components.html: The enterprise tier is the free tier.
components.css: .ds-two-tone { margin: 0; color: #f2f6f5; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-stretch: 110%; font-size: 38px; line-height: 1.04; letter-spacing: -0.03em; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-two-tone span { color: #a8b4b3; }

narrative.overview: Memoturn's console has always been a dark instrument panel — telemetry on a near-black ground, teal as data. The public surfaces now match the product instead of inverting it: a sea-ink-tinted near-black canvas (never pure #000), hairline-ledger structure, oversized tight-set Archivo headlines in two tones, one surgical lagoon accent, real console captures framed with a faint lagoon glow, and a single loud atoll-gradient moment at the end of every page. The product IS the imagery; the canvas IS the brand. Going dark moved Memoturn closer to the orchestrator-glow family's turf, so the separating discipline is explicit: flat hairline ledgers instead of glassmorphic tiles, a static top-edge glow wash instead of pulsing accent borders, real product captures instead of faux-3D abstractions, one accent used surgically instead of a neon wash.
keyCharacteristics: One family: Archivo variable (weight + width axes); display voice = font-stretch 110% + -0.03em. JetBrains Mono for code, data, meta.
Two-tone headlines are the section-header system; uppercase tracked eyebrows are retired as section grammar.
The sea-ink-tinted canvas carries the brand; lagoon #4fb8b2 is reserved for links, focus, data, chips, and glow.
Real console captures (bun run screenshots, dark theme, @2x) are required imagery: dashboard in the hero, matching surface per feature card.
Hairline rules and tonal layering carry depth; the only radial treatment is the static lagoon glow wash.
Lagoon → Atoll gradient is the only gradient; load-bearing on the brand mark and closing band.

rules.name: The Canvas-Tint Rule
rules.body: Every dark surface carries the sea-ink hue (oklch hue ~215, chroma 0.012-0.014). Pure #000 and neutral-gray darks are forbidden.

rules.name: The Surgical-Lagoon Rule
rules.body: Lagoon appears as text/stroke/glow at small scale only. A lagoon-filled button, panel, or band is forbidden; when the brand needs to be loud, the atoll gradient is the instrument.

rules.name: The Lagoon-Atoll Rule
rules.body: gradient-lagoon and gradient-atoll are the only gradients; the static glow wash is a lighting treatment, not a gradient surface.

rules.name: The Foam-Light-On-Dark Rule
rules.body: On the atoll gradient the only valid foreground is foam-light at >=92% opacity; secondary buttons darken their fill rather than fade their text.

rules.name: The Two-Tone Rule
rules.body: Section identity is carried by the two-tone headline. At most one deliberate kicker moment per page.

rules.name: The Tight-Set Rule
rules.body: Display type: line-height <=1.05, tracking -0.03em at 110% width; -0.04em is the floor.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Archivo + JetBrains Mono is the system. A second sans, a serif, or italics are flags to revise.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces have no shadow; overlays are exempt because elevation IS their meaning.

rules.name: The Static-Glow Rule
rules.body: The lagoon glow is the only radial treatment: top-edge origin, <=10% (16% hero), static or hover-faded. Animated glows, glowing borders, and glassmorphism are forbidden.

rules.name: The Real-Capture Rule
rules.body: Product imagery is real console output captured by the screenshot pipeline. Mocked UI and stock imagery are forbidden.

rules.name: The Four-Shapes Rule
rules.body: Foam-primary, outline, on-gradient primary, on-gradient secondary (+ quiet-link). A fifth shape means the design wanted a different component.

rules.name: The Card-Grid-Three-Only Rule
rules.body: Three is the only valid identical-card count.

dos: Do lead with mechanism: name the store, the transport, the surface.
Do ship the dark canvas tinted toward sea-ink; marketing dark-only, docs default dark with a light reading mode.
Do show the real console: hero dashboard bottom-masked into the canvas, matching capture per feature card.
Do use lagoon surgically and let the foam-filled button be the loud element.
Do set section headers as two-tone sentences.
Do break out the wedge (SSO/RBAC/audit/PII/retention/rate limits) as its own section.
Do keep the atoll band as the single loud brand moment at page end.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on the tide rotation, rise-in, and glow fade.
Do run the category-reflex check at both altitudes; distance to orchestrator-glow stays the largest.
donts: Don't look like generic SaaS gradient-hero (Cursor, Vercel-style).
Don't look like AI-product neon-purple-on-black (OpenAI, Replit-style).
Don't look like enterprise-AI navy-and-rounded (IBM watsonx, Azure-style).
Don't look like AI-agent orchestrator glow (mem0.ai-style): no glassmorphic tiles, no pulsing accent borders, no glow halos, no faux-3D depth, no AI-inbox layouts.
Don't use side-stripe borders (>1px colored border-left/right) anywhere, including docs asides.
Don't use gradient text, hero-metric stat blocks, or identical card grids beyond the single three-up.
Don't put uppercase tracked eyebrows above section headings.
Don't set lagoon #4fb8b2 as text on light surfaces; light mode uses light-primary.
Don't ship a marketing surface without product imagery.
Don't invent gradients beyond lagoon/atoll + the static glow wash, add resting-surface shadows, or introduce a third typeface.
Don't put coastal vocabulary in interface copy; no hype words, exclamation marks, or emoji in marketing copy.
Don't rely on color alone for status.
